reviews.comment:
Si sos socio del ACA, salvo el 5% de descuento en el combustible, no tenés ningún privilegio respecto a los que no lo son. Es decir que si hay larga cola en los surtidores, tendrás que bancartela como un ciudadano mas. Correcto el auxilio y muy amable el personal. La carga en los surtidores provoca dudas: en algunos el tanque de combustible admite cierta cantidad. En otros, menos. Claro, esto es algo subjetivo ya que cuando se carga, siempre hay un resto imponderado que no permite conocer el volumen que resta para llenar el tanque.

(Translated by Google)
If you're an ACA member, except for the 5% discount on fuel, you don't have any privileges compared to non-members. This means that if there's a long line at the pumps, you'll have to endure it like a normal citizen. The assistance was adequate, and the staff was very friendly. Filling up at the pumps raises questions: some have a certain amount of fuel in their tanks. Others have less. Of course, this is subjective, since when filling up, there's always an undetermined amount left, which makes it impossible to know how much is left to fill the tank.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVajllRG1RRRAB
